title: Content Directory for WorkForms
excerpt: Using monday.com as an Enterprise solution, it is important that we are able to identify all contents.  The Content Directory provides Admins visibility of all boards, whether Main, Shareable or Private.  The same is nee…

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: Using monday.com as an Enterprise solution, it is important that we are able to identify all contents. The Content Directory provides Admins visibility of all boards, whether Main, Shareable or Private. The same is needed for Forms. Currently if a WorkForm is created attached to a Private board, Admins have no way of knowing it exists.
